description: Direct bias method (37.0%) will outperform Kalman bias method (45.93%) for DHT22 humidity calibration, given stable environment

prediction.conclusion: Direct method is more accurate for this sensor when environment is stable

grading_criteria: CORRECT if next Creator GT measurement is within 60-62% humidity (confirming direct method), MOSTLY_CORRECT if within 58-63%, INCORRECT if outside 55-65% range
